# kemp_real_server (Data Source)

Reads a real server attached to a Kemp virtual service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_real_server" "existing" {
  virtual_service_id = "12"
  id                 = 26
}

output "existing_rs_address" {
  value = data.kemp_real_server.existing.address
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) LoadMaster `RsIndex`.
- `virtual_service_id` (String) Index of the parent virtual service.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String)
- `critical` (Boolean)
- `dns_name` (String)
- `enable` (Boolean)
- `follow` (Number)
- `forward` (String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `port` (String)
- `weight` (Number)
